problem id: de11a23a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(6)

examples:
  00110011 -> 00000000
  11000001 -> 00000011
  00001101 -> 00000000
  00000110 -> 00000000
  10001100 -> 00000010
  11011100 -> 00000011
  10100010 -> 00000010
  00110110 -> 00000000
  11011011 -> 00000011
  10000111 -> 00000010

query: 01110001
predicted answer: 00000001
